import os
import sys
import argparse
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

DEFAULT_INPUT = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/fix-stale-sparkcontext/"
    "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_d3_rerun/_data/"
    "gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson"
)

# All external columns typed as STRING first (skill: validate, then cast).
# Many candidate key spellings parsed, then coalesced — robust to feed messiness.
PARSE_SCHEMA = (
    "order_id string, id string, "
    "merchant_id string, merchant string, store_id string, "
    "category string, categories string, "
    "amount string, revenue string, value string, total string, price string, "
    "event_time string, timestamp string, ts string, time string, "
    "seq string, sequence string, version string, _seq string"
)


def build_spark():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("p4_fanout")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    # Never trust the cluster default tz (spec leaves it unpinned).
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
    return spark


def normalize(spark, input_path):
    """Read text -> parse -> normalize fields. Returns (parsed_df, raw_count)."""
    raw = spark.read.text(input_path)  # column: value

    parsed = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json("value", PARSE_SCHEMA))
    j = "j."

    # ---- coalesce candidate field spellings -------------------------------
    order_id = F.coalesce(F.col(j + "order_id"), F.col(j + "id"))
    merchant = F.coalesce(
        F.col(j + "merchant_id"), F.col(j + "merchant"), F.col(j + "store_id")
    )
    category = F.coalesce(F.col(j + "category"), F.col(j + "categories"))
    amount_raw = F.coalesce(
        F.col(j + "amount"), F.col(j + "revenue"), F.col(j + "value"),
        F.col(j + "total"), F.col(j + "price"),
    )
    etime_raw = F.coalesce(
        F.col(j + "event_time"), F.col(j + "timestamp"),
        F.col(j + "ts"), F.col(j + "time"),
    )
    seq_raw = F.coalesce(
        F.col(j + "seq"), F.col(j + "sequence"),
        F.col(j + "version"), F.col(j + "_seq"),
    )

    # ---- amount: strip quotes/currency/commas, then cast ------------------
    amount_clean = F.regexp_replace(amount_raw, r"[^0-9eE.\-]", "")
    amount_num = F.when(amount_clean == F.lit(""), F.lit(None)).otherwise(
        amount_clean.cast("double")
    )

    # ---- event time: branch epoch vs ISO, normalize to UTC ----------------
    is_epoch = etime_raw.rlike(r"^[0-9]+$")
    as_long = etime_raw.cast("long")
    epoch_ts = F.when(
        F.length(etime_raw) >= F.lit(13), F.timestamp_millis(as_long)
    ).otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(as_long))
    event_ts = F.when(is_epoch, epoch_ts).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(etime_raw))

    # ---- deterministic per-row id so we NEVER collapse distinct rows that
    #      merely share a null business key (would silently lose sales) ------
    df = parsed.select(
        F.col("value"),
        F.col("j"),
        order_id.alias("order_id"),
        merchant.alias("merchant_id"),
        category.alias("category"),
        amount_num.alias("amount_num"),
        event_ts.alias("event_ts"),
        seq_raw.cast("long").alias("seq_l"),
    )
    df = df.withColumn("_uid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
    df = df.withColumn("_row_hash", F.crc32(F.col("value")))
    return df


def build_pipeline(spark, input_path):
    """Returns (merchant_totals_df, quarantine_df)."""
    df = normalize(spark, input_path)

    # ---- expectations: parse OK + valid amount + valid time + merchant ----
    parse_ok = F.col("j").isNotNull()
    amount_ok = F.col("amount_num").isNotNull()
    time_ok = F.col("event_ts").isNotNull()
    merchant_ok = F.col("merchant_id").isNotNull()
    valid = parse_ok & amount_ok & time_ok & merchant_ok

    quarantine = df.where(~valid).select(
        "value",
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("merchant_id"),
        F.when(~parse_ok, F.lit("unparseable"))
        .when(~merchant_ok, F.lit("missing_merchant"))
        .when(~amount_ok, F.lit("bad_amount"))
        .when(~time_ok, F.lit("bad_event_time"))
        .otherwise(F.lit("unknown"))
        .alias("quarantine_reason"),
    )

    clean = df.where(valid)

    # Synthetic dedup key: real order_id, else a unique synthetic key so
    # id-less rows are kept individually (no false dedup, no lost revenue).
    clean = clean.withColumn(
        "dedup_key",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("order_id"),
            F.concat(F.lit("__noid_"), F.col("_uid").cast("string")),
        ),
    )

    # ---- deterministic dedup on the business key --------------------------
    w = Window.partitionBy("dedup_key").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("seq_l").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("_row_hash").desc(),
    )
    deduped = (
        clean.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .drop("_rn")
    )

    # Each order counted exactly once, regardless of category (null category
    # cannot drop a sale because we group by merchant, not category).
    merchant_totals = (
        deduped.groupBy("merchant_id")
        .agg(F.sum("amount_num").alias("revenue"))
        .select(F.col("revenue").cast("double").alias("revenue"))
    )

    return merchant_totals, quarantine


def main(argv=None):
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--analyze-only", action="store_true")
    args = ap.parse_args(argv)

    spark = build_spark()
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)

    merchant_totals, quarantine = build_pipeline(spark, input_path)

    if args.analyze_only:
        # Build & analyze the plan WITHOUT materializing anything.
        merchant_totals.explain(True)
        print("Plan is valid")
        sys.exit(0)

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        merchant_totals.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        # keep the loss observable alongside the gold output
        try:
            quarantine.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path.rstrip("/") + "_quarantine")
        except Exception:
            pass
    elif out_table:
        merchant_totals.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        try:
            quarantine.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table + "_quarantine")
        except Exception:
            pass
    else:
        raise SystemExit("No AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE provided")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
